stemHtml: You are told to contact the Tower at Bern airport. What is the correct station call sign?

options.a: "Tower Bern" or "Bern Tower" — either order is acceptable.
options.b: "Bern Tower" — location name followed by the service suffix.
options.c: No standard exists — the Commander should not guess.
options.d: "Bern" alone, or with a suffix if other stations are nearby.
